---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div class="page-wrap">

<p class="section-header">Experience</p>

<div class="exp-item">
<div class="exp-date">Aug 2023 – Aug 2025</div>
<div>
<div class="exp-company">Samsung Semiconductors India Research</div>
<div class="exp-role">Senior Engineer · Bangalore, India</div>
<div class="exp-desc">
Designed and verified digital circuits in SystemVerilog for NVMe SSD controller ASICs targeting datacenter, client, and automotive platforms. Owned RTL implementation, AXI/AHB protocol integration, synthesis and timing closure in Synopsys Design Compiler, and full signoff (DFT lint, CDC, LDRC). Built and ran UVM testbenches for PCIe and NVMe functional verification. Led latency reduction initiatives recognized with Samsung's SPOT award and Employee of the Month distinction.
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-item">
<div class="exp-date">Jan 2023 – Aug 2023</div>
<div>
<div class="exp-company">Samsung Semiconductors India Research</div>
<div class="exp-role">Hardware Intern · Bangalore, India</div>
<div class="exp-desc">
Designed embedded memory controllers and UFS 4.0 interface logic for the Samsung Galaxy S25 series using Verilog HDL and ASIC design methodologies. Developed UVM-based design-level testbenches and performed functional verification and coverage analysis against design specifications.
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-item">
<div class="exp-date">May 2022 – Jul 2022</div>
<div>
<div class="exp-company">Center of Robotics and Innovation</div>
<div class="exp-role">Summer Intern · Funded by Neuberg Anand Labs</div>
<div class="exp-desc">
Programmed a 5-axis robotic arm control system for automated medical sample identification and sorting via barcode scanning using embedded C. Integrated hardware with Raspberry Pi and implemented real-time control algorithms currently deployed in diagnostic laboratory operations.
</div>
</div>
</div>

---

<p class="section-header">Education</p>

<div class="exp-item">
<div class="exp-date">Expected Dec 2026</div>
<div>
<div class="exp-company">University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign</div>
<div class="exp-role">Master of Engineering, Electrical and Computer Engineering</div>
<div class="exp-desc">
Relevant coursework: Computer Organization & Design (ECE411), Applied Parallel Programming / CUDA (ECE408), Logic Synthesis (ECE462), Introduction to VLSI (ECE425), Advanced Computer Architecture (ECE511).
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-item">
<div class="exp-date">Aug 2019 – Jun 2023</div>
<div>
<div class="exp-company">PES University, RR Campus</div>
<div class="exp-role">B.Tech, Electronics and Communication (specialization: VLSI) · GPA 8.58/10</div>
<div class="exp-desc">
MRD Scholarship — 40% merit scholarship awarded to top of class. Graduated with Distinction. Relevant coursework: Advanced Digital Design, Digital VLSI, Verification of Digital Systems, Advanced Hardware Acceleration.
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>
